Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: aether-pulse-x social engagement monitor

LLM-powered X \(Twitter\) discovery system for AETHER framework outreach.
Scrapes posts via Apify, scores with semantic intent classification \(T1-T6 tiers\),
drafts replies in Jeff Conn''s voice, and sends to Telegram for human review.

Key features:
- Semantic scoring via Claude API \(not keyword matching\)
- Human-in-the-loop guarantee: Telegram drafts only, no Twitter write API
- X-adjusted character counting \(URLs = 23 chars\)
- Recency scoring with 48hr threshold
- Power word verification in drafts
- Snapshot mode for image/URL analysis
- AETHER capsule structure with persona, kb, and kg

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
